data.title: Create emit-review-event.sh JSONL event writer
data.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/scripts/emit-review-event.sh that:
1. Sources ticket-lib.sh for _flock_stage_commit()
2. Accepts: event_type (required), event fields as JSON string
3. Validates event_type against allowed set (review_result, commit_workflow, tier_selection, overlay_trigger)
4. Constructs JSONL line with: schema_version (1), event_type, timestamp (ISO8601), and event-specific fields
5. Writes to .review-events/<timestamp>-<random-suffix>.jsonl (one line per file, unique filename)
6. Calls _flock_stage_commit() for atomic placement and git commit on orphan branch
7. Returns 0 on success, non-zero on failure with stderr message; never crashes the caller

Implementation note: the lock-exhaustion test (test_emit_graceful_failure_lock_exhaustion) requires a mechanism to inject a short flock timeout — consider an env var override (e.g., REVIEW_EVENT_FLOCK_TIMEOUT) for testability.

## TDD Requirement

GREEN — Task 4's RED tests pass after implementation.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/emit-review-event.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/emit-review-event.sh
- [ ] All 6 emit-review-event tests pass (behavioral gate)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-emit-review-event.sh
- [ ] Script fails gracefully when ticket-lib.sh is absent (behavioral check for source dependency)
  Verify: bash -c 'PATH=/dev/null bash plugins/dso/scripts/emit-review-event.sh review_result "{}" 2>&1 | grep -qi "ticket-lib\|not found\|No such"'
